findings.problem: Once the heat-spike beat passes, the chapter starts reporting the patch's most consequential costs instead of making the reader undergo them. Stage five, stage six, and the first diagnostic block arrive as orderly summary and result-sheet language, so the irreversible severance of Lena's lifelong autonomous support reads more legible than harrowing. That is timidity at the chapter's central bodily consequence: the text tells us which functions changed before it fully forces Lena to collide with those absences in scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the summary-heavy beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:127 so at least part of stage five, stage six, and the immediate post-patch testing are dramatized through specific bodily failures, disorientation, or misfires before Yusuf or the narration names the system layer involved. Keep the existing must-land beats: the sensory rewrite, the autonomous-layer severance, the slower diagnostics, and the silence-cost.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:127 contains at least two concrete on-page consequences Lena has to physically manage before or as the diagnostics are interpreted, and a cold reader can describe what is harder for her now from scene evidence alone. Fail if those beats still mostly move from stage label to abstract capability summary to test-result list without first making the altered body misbehave on the page.

findings.problem: The chapter returns too often to the same explanatory before/after scaffold: a sensation Lena 'had always' received one way is now revealed as a hidden system correction or subtraction. The individual observations are good, but the repeated construction starts to feel pre-interpreted, so each new loss arrives in the same rhythm instead of with fresh surprise. That mechanical recurrence smooths away some of the singularity the chapter's sensory premise should generate.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the phrasing and delivery of the altered-perception beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:39, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:107, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153. Cut or recast some of the explicit 'had always/was the same ... now plain' pivots, and let at least two of those realizations arrive as unframed sensation, action, or memory-pressure rather than an immediately paraphrased comparison between old optimized perception and new stripped perception.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised cited spans no longer stack the same explanatory reveal pattern more than twice, and at least one quiet-post-patch beat communicates altered perception without directly stating the prior hidden correction. Fail if those lines still keep announcing the cost through repeated 'it had always been X; now she noticed Y' constructions.

summary: Strong continuity control and mostly character-true dialogue, but not a pass-level chapter on craft/prose yet. The overnight patch ordeal lands its stakes and the quiet aftermath is clear, yet the draft gets too reportorial during the most irreversible parts of the rewrite, then leans repeatedly on the same hidden-system-versus-plain-perception comparison to explain the cost. No continuity contradiction or tense drift detected; award fails because the chapter is effective without yet feeling singular.
